productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Printed Red Belt
description: With embossed ethnic print in a traditional red and cream combination, this belt from lino perros blends perfectly with denim trousers or shorts and ethnic tops. Length: 108 cm Made of leatherette with embossed ethnic print Has a tang clasp with five holes Fixed loop to hold the tail in place Velvetty inner for comfort Care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust
